title: Nesterov Accelerated Gradient (NAG) Optimization Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of Nesterov's Accelerated Gradient descent, a momentum-based optimization technique that 'looks ahead' for more effective parameter updates.
relationships: Initialize θ and v -> Calculate lookahead position -> Compute gradient at lookahead -> Update momentum vector with gradient -> Update parameters using new momentum -> Repeat until convergence
